ALCHEMIST-ACCRETION_POWER.title: Accretion
ALCHEMIST-ACCRETION_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Regen[/gold]. [gold]Gambit[/gold]: Gain {Amount} additional [gold]Regen[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-ACCRETION_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Regen[/gold]. [gold]Gambit[/gold]: Gain {Amount} additional [gold]Regen[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-CHORUS_POWER.title: Chorus
ALCHEMIST-CHRYSOPOEIA_POWER.title: Chrysopoeia
ALCHEMIST-CHRYSOPOEIA_POWER.description: Whenever you take [gold]Poison[/gold] damage, gain {Amount} Gold.
ALCHEMIST-CHRYSOPOEIA_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you take [gold]Poison[/gold] damage, gain {Amount} Gold.
ALCHEMIST-CONJUNCTION_POWER.title: Conjunction
ALCHEMIST-CONJUNCTION_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, if you have both [gold]Poison[/gold] and [gold]Regen[/gold], gain {Amount} Energy.
ALCHEMIST-CONJUNCTION_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, if you have both [gold]Poison[/gold] and [gold]Regen[/gold], gain {Amount} Energy.
ALCHEMIST-ELIXIR_POWER.title: Elixir
ALCHEMIST-ELIXIR_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, procure {Amount} random potion(s).
ALCHEMIST-ELIXIR_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, procure {Amount} random {Amount:plural:potion|potions}.
ALCHEMIST-DETONATION_POWER.title: Detonation
ALCHEMIST-DETONATION_POWER.description: Whenever you create a card, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-DETONATION_POWER.smartDescript: Whenever you create a card, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-FESTER_POWER.title: Fester
ALCHEMIST-FESTER_POWER.description: Poison is triggered against this enemy {Amount} additional {Amount:plural:time|times}.
ALCHEMIST-FESTER_POWER.smartDescription: Poison is triggered against this enemy {Amount} additional {Amount:plural:time|times}.
ALCHEMIST-HARVEST_POWER.title: Harvest
ALCHEMIST-HOMEOSTASIS_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, if your HP is between 33-66% of your Max HP, draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} and gain {Amount} Energy.
ALCHEMIST-HOMEOSTASIS_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, if your HP is between 33-66% of your Max HP, draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} and gain {Amount} Energy.
ALCHEMIST-HOMEOSTASIS_POWER.title: Homeostasis
ALCHEMIST-HARVEST_POWER.description: Gain {Amount} additional Potion reward(s) at end of combat.
ALCHEMIST-HARVEST_POWER.smartDescription: Gain {Amount} additional Potion reward(s) at end of combat.
ALCHEMIST-INDUCEMENT_POWER.title: Inducement
ALCHEMIST-INDUCEMENT_POWER.description: Whenever you take [gold]Poison[/gold] damage, apply that much [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-INDUCEMENT_POWER.smartDescript: Whenever you take [gold]Poison[/gold] damage, apply that much [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-INVERSION_POWER.title: Inversion
ALCHEMIST-INVERSION_POWER.description: Whenever you are healed, deal that much damage to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-INVERSION_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever you are healed, deal that much damage to ALL enemies {Hits} {Hits:plural:time|times}.
ALCHEMIST-IMBUE_POWER.title: Imbue
ALCHEMIST-IMBUE_POWER.description: The first time you gain or apply [gold]Poison[/gold] each turn, [gold]Infuse[/gold] {Amount} random {Amount:plural:card|cards} in your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-IMBUE_POWER.smartDescription: The first time you gain or apply [gold]Poison[/gold] each turn, [gold]Infuse[/gold] {Amount} random {Amount:plural:card|cards} in your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-MERCURIAL_FORM_POWER.title: Mercurial Form
ALCHEMIST-MERCURIAL_FORM_POWER.descripti: Whenever you create a card, gain {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-MERCURIAL_FORM_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you create a card, gain {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-PERMEATE_POWER.title: Permeate
ALCHEMIST-PERMEATE_POWER.description: Whenever you gain health, apply {Amount} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies. Removed at end of turn.
ALCHEMIST-PERMEATE_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you gain health, apply {Amount} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies. Removed at end of turn.
ALCHEMIST-PHILTRE_POWER.title: Philtre
ALCHEMIST-PHILTRE_POWER.description: Whenever you use a Potion, gain {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
ALCHEMIST-PHILTRE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you use a Potion, gain {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
ALCHEMIST-PHILTRE_BUFF_POWER.title: Philtre
ALCHEMIST-PHILTRE_BUFF_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, lose {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-PHILTRE_BUFF_POWER.smartDescri: At the end of your turn, lose {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-PRECIPITATE_POWER.title: Precipitate
ALCHEMIST-PRECIPITATE_POWER.description: The next {Amount} Potion(s) you use will be procured again.
ALCHEMIST-PRECIPITATE_POWER.smartDescrip: The next {Amount} Potion(s) you use will be procured again.
ALCHEMIST-RESOLVE_POWER.title: Resolve
ALCHEMIST-RESOLVE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each 20 HP you are missing.
ALCHEMIST-RESOLVE_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each 20 HP you are missing.
ALCHEMIST-SECRETION_POWER.title: Secretion
ALCHEMIST-SECRETION_POWER.description: When hit by an attack, apply {Amount} [gold]Poison[/gold] to the attacker.
ALCHEMIST-SECRETION_POWER.smartDescripti: When hit by an attack, apply {Amount} [gold]Poison[/gold] to the attacker.
ALCHEMIST-SEDIMENT_POWER.title: Sediment
ALCHEMIST-SEDIMENT_POWER.description: Whenever you gain or apply [gold]Poison[/gold], gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-SEDIMENT_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you gain or apply [gold]Poison[/gold], gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-SEPSIS_POWER.title: Sepsis
ALCHEMIST-SEPSIS_POWER.description: Poisoned enemies take {Amount}% more damage from your attacks.
ALCHEMIST-SEPSIS_POWER.smartDescription: Poisoned enemies take {Amount}% more damage from your attacks.
ALCHEMIST-VIRULENCE_POWER.title: Virulence
ALCHEMIST-VIRULENCE_POWER.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], apply an additional {Amount} [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-VIRULENCE_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], apply an additional {Amount} [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-VOLATILITY_POWER.title: Volatility
ALCHEMIST-VOLATILITY_POWER.description: The first time your HP changes each turn, apply {Amount} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-VOLATILITY_POWER.smartDescript: The first time your HP changes each turn, apply {Amount} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-WINDFALL_POWER.title: Windfall
ALCHEMIST-WINDFALL_POWER.description: Whenever you Procure a Potion during combat, draw {Amount} card(s) and gain 1 Energy per Windfall played.
ALCHEMIST-WINDFALL_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you Procure a Potion during combat, draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} and gain {Copies} Energy.
ALCHEMIST-REFLUX_POWER.title: Reflux
ALCHEMIST-REFLUX_POWER.description: Whenever another player applies a debuff, apply {Amount} [gold]Poison[/gold] to that enemy.
ALCHEMIST-REFLUX_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever another player applies a debuff, apply {Amount} [gold]Poison[/gold] to that enemy.
ALCHEMIST-PANACEA_POWER.title: Panacea
ALCHEMIST-PANACEA_POWER.description: Whenever you would drop to or below 50% HP, ALL allies gain {Amount} [gold]Regen[/gold] and heal {Amount} HP.
ALCHEMIST-PANACEA_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you would drop to or below 50% HP, ALL allies gain {Amount} [gold]Regen[/gold] and heal {Amount} HP.
